## How I tested

## Checklist

- [ ] Change is focused and reasonably small
- [ ] No shell-string interpolation of env vars / user input (argv-form only)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the changed behavior
- [ ] Updated `README.md` / docs if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` if notable
